{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032409382565E912F9594EE2135F87"}"},"total":340},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608146511110128408","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，一口气看完。内核是正能量的，迪化本以为是演戏方面不太喜欢，但是是对黑方面的，文笔很好，迪化写得很有趣，不枯燥。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771412336,"group_id":"7592985496125443134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"鲜衣怒马少年时，不撞南墙不回头","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3dxIrlRx0uryw2XfHFUvD0IReztHC3cXBWezqDc2Kl5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/45368d982f1d4d7eb1bcfca843ba45c7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879553&x-signature=TbvfGHhZbGvqmeuzRYNGKhTZJF4%3D","user_id":"2747038981697075","user_name":"七字开头的城"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2747038981697075","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592985496125443134","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚出，后续会涨】
【拍戏、思维迪化、单主角，单女主，不是双主角】
当今蓝星影坛，有这么一个神奇的存在。
他没有读过影视学院，并非科班出身。
但他凭借一身‘炉火纯青’的演技，演杀人犯，把自己演上了法治频道，演军阀少爷，一句‘我不吃牛肉’火遍全国。
所有人都不明白为什么他能演这么像，明明脸长的也不是很凶，甚至沾点斯文败类。
就连某影帝都评价道：还好陈观生当了演员，不然对社会一点好处都没有。
同一个节目中，他也回应道：早年间网络不发达，其实很多人真的认为我是黑社会。
他演任何反派都是入木三分！
“所以这辈子，我绝不能重蹈覆辙，做违法乱纪的勾当！”
重活一世，陈观生从刑场的噩梦中惊醒，他发誓，今生要本本分分的活着。
那他这辈子到底要做什么，才适合他呢？
就在陈观生冥思苦想的时候，一个导演找上了他，递给他一本剧本。
......
“我叫黎清辞，影视圈中人称我为天才少女编剧，但实际上我有个秘密，我的剧本，都是抄来的！抄前世的！其实我来自一个叫地球的世界！可惜我不会表演，只能当编剧了！”
不对！大事不对！为什么这个男人总能出现在我的剧本里！还能把我笔下的所有反派演绎的淋漓尽致！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8c6e38eb202192ad2fa96eb42fb377ef","author":"青山病院扛把子","author_id":"","book_id":"7592985496125443134","book_name":"为什么演反派像，因为前世死刑犯","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592985606741836350","read_count":"125717","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"322640"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"140","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,重生,娱乐圈,天才,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a488af8cfe1eaed086df50af08cb31b0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500306&x-signature=pF3Xo5tp1gP77B1xhx4z9D0Pj9o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"70194078645","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"144"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032409382565E912F9594EE2135F87"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forw
